Title: Small Square Photo Picture Latch Hinges for Boxes
Description:
Elevate your custom boxes, shadow boxes, or display cases with these decorative metal hinges. Featuring a classic design with sturdy hardware, these latches provide both secure functionality and an antique, rustic aesthetic.

Features & Details:

  • Durable Material: Constructed from sturdy metal, ensuring longevity and reliable use with every open and close.
  • Versatile Use: Perfect for decorative display boxes, keepsake containers, artisan packaging, or crafting projects.
  • Easy Installation: Designed with pre-drilled holes and straightforward mounting points for simple assembly.
  • Aesthetic Appeal: The subtle, aged finish complements a variety of styles, from farmhouse chic to industrial modern.

These hinges are ideal for giving a polished, finished look to handmade goods, making them perfect for gift packaging or retail display solutions.
